ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemical_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical standard */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the chemical standard */,
  "min_concentration" REAL /* Minimum concentration level allowed */,
  "nominal_concentration" TEXT /* Nominal concentration level considered standard */,
  "max_concentration" REAL /* Maximum concentration level allowed */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes for the standard, if any */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standard was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* The regulatory body that sets the standard */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the standard (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Organic, Inorganic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category for hierarchical classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was manufactured */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_logs" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being checked */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard used for the compliance check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the compliance check */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or comments on the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES chemical_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., quality manager, compliance officer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
